title: achimenes antirrhina
intro: Achimenes antirrhina, also known as the Mexican orchid or hot water plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. The medicinal properties of Achimenes antirrhina include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its use in reducing pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of Achimenes antirrhina include infusions and decoctions made from the leaves and roots of the plant, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
